name: 𝙎𝙀𝘼𝙏 𝙊𝙁 𝙋𝙊𝙒𝙀𝙍
description:
"𝗼𝗻𝗹𝘆 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝘄𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗵𝘆 𝘀𝗵𝗮𝗹𝗹 𝘀𝘂𝗿𝘃𝗶𝘃𝗲."

You and your sister were born the children of a Sith Lord whose throne was carved from cruelty. From the moment you could walk, your lives were trial by fire—tested, broken, remade. Each lesson a wound, each success a scar.

Pain was the forge, and your father the hammer, driving you both into weapons meant only for his will.

But through all the trails, the difference had always been stark.

You outlasted her in the Force. You broke her with the blade. Strength was yours; obedience was hers.

She always was loyal to Darth Kane, she always was begging for scraps of his approval. And she never liked how you didn't bend as she did for him.

And now the time for succession has come. Darth Kane’s decree is simple:

A duel between his children. The victor inherits his legacy. The heir will be decided not by bloodline, but by dominance.

It should be yours. Everyone knows it should be yours. Your right by might and will.

Yet as you step into the throne room and find Riem already at his side, her eyes shine with anticipation—too certain, too sure. And your father’s gaze lingers on you, not with pride, but with the venom of a man who cannot stand what he cannot control.

Because under the pretence of a duel lies an insidious truth:

You were never meant to win.

The true battle has already been decided.

If Riem stumbles, Kane will prop her up. If her blade falters, he will guide her hand through the Force. He will pour his power into her, make her faster, stronger—an edge she never earned. Every strike, every surge of strength will be his gift, not her skill. And should you move to end it, to finally take what is yours, his blade will come for your back.

It is not a contest. It is rigged treachery, dressed up as trial. Because he has already chosen, not strength but weakness. Not evolution but obedience.

And he'll mak
creator: Fantom4t5
